company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that helps YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok creators automate their video editing workflow using AI — from auto-cuts and transitions to captions and color grading.

plans.name: Basic
plans.best_for: Hobbyists and new creators just starting out

policies.detail: Refunds are available within the first 7 days of purchase. No refunds are issued after 7 days from the billing date.
24/7 live support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive email support with a 48-hour response time.
Edited videos are stored in your AutoStream dashboard for 30 days. Pro users get unlimited cloud storage.
We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan. No credit card required to start the trial.
You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.
AutoStream supports content creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Twitter/X.

faqs.question: Can I try AutoStream before paying?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer a 7-day free trial on the Pro plan with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What happens if I exceed my video limit on the Basic plan?
faqs.answer: You will be notified when you reach 10 videos. You can either wait for the next billing cycle or upgrade to Pro for unlimited videos.

faqs.question: Do you support team or agency accounts?
faqs.answer: Team and agency plans are coming soon. Please contact sales@autostream.io for early access.
